main_prompt: Cinematic travel photography of Paris 1889 during the Exposition Universelle, 1:1 square format for Instagram, luxury campaign style, golden hour lighting casting warm amber glow, the newly inaugurated Eiffel Tower painted in Rouge Venise (dark reddish-brown) centered and towering majestically against soft pastel sky, elegant Belle Époque crowds in period-accurate fashion in foreground, Haussmannian architecture bathed in golden light flanking the composition, professional color grading with rich warm tones and elegant saturation, shot on medium format camera with beautiful depth of field, foreground sharp with soft bokeh, National Geographic quality editorial photography, aspirational mood evoking timeless elegance, vibrant but sophisticated colors, atmospheric haze creating depth, 8K ultra detailed, square composition perfect for Instagram feeds, luxury travel editorial aesthetic

composition_notes.instagram_optimization: Square 1:1 format designed for maximum visual impact in Instagram feeds, centered composition with strong focal point
composition_notes.vertical_emphasis: Using vertical elements (Eiffel Tower, Haussmannian buildings) to create height within square format
framing_options: Option 1: Eiffel Tower centered vertically with Belle Époque figures in sharp foreground, architecture flanking
Option 2: Intimate street scene with Tower visible in upper background, focus on elegantly dressed period crowd
Option 3: Symmetrical composition with Tower centered, Haussmannian facades on both sides creating balanced frame

time_period_specifics.eiffel_tower: Newly inaugurated Eiffel Tower in original Rouge Venise paint (dark reddish-brown gradient), iron lattice catching golden hour light with dramatic highlights
time_period_specifics.galerie_des_machines: Massive blue-grey steel and glass cathedral visible in background or mid-ground
time_period_specifics.architecture_style: Haussmannian buildings with cream limestone, grey-blue zinc roofs, ornate balconies
time_period_specifics.historical_context: Belle Époque optimism, industrial revolution elegance

fashion_1889.women: Belle Époque elegance, S-silhouette dresses with corseted waists, luxurious fabrics in jewel tones, elaborate feathered hats, lace parasols, long gloves, positioned prominently for Instagram engagement
fashion_1889.men: Distinguished three-piece suits and frock coats, top hats or bowler hats, handlebar mustaches, canes, epitome of 1889 masculine elegance
fashion_1889.styling: Period-accurate fashion crucial, clothing catching golden light beautifully, rich textures visible in 8K detail

golden_hour_lighting.time_of_day: Golden hour, warm soft directional light
golden_hour_lighting.light_quality: Amber and golden tones, long shadows, romantic atmospheric quality
golden_hour_lighting.sky: Soft pastel peachy-pink and lavender tones, light clouds catching gold
golden_hour_lighting.atmospheric_haze: Gentle haze adding depth, volumetric light quality
golden_hour_lighting.light_on_subjects: Warm glow on faces and clothing, beautiful backlighting and rim lighting
golden_hour_lighting.reflections: Slightly damp cobblestones reflecting golden light

color_palette.color_grading_style: Luxury campaign grading, warm inviting sophisticated tones, lifted shadows, creamy highlights, elegant saturation
color_palette.instagram_appeal: Colors that pop in Instagram feeds while maintaining sophistication and class
color_palette.vibrance: Vibrant but elegant, rich saturation without oversaturation

camera_technical.depth_of_field: Shallow to medium depth of field optimized for square format, foreground sharp, background elegantly soft
camera_technical.focal_length_feel: Medium focal length (50-85mm equivalent), flattering natural perspective
camera_technical.sharpness: 8K ultra detailed in focus areas, every texture visible
camera_technical.bokeh: Beautiful circular bokeh in out-of-focus areas, creamy smooth quality
camera_technical.image_quality: Professional editorial quality, clean with subtle film-like organic texture

composition.layout: Strong centered composition for square format, visual balance, rule of thirds adapted to 1:1
composition.foreground: Belle Époque figures or architectural details in sharp focus, creating depth and interest
composition.symmetry: Consider symmetrical framing for elegant square composition
composition.visual_hierarchy: Clear focal point guiding viewer's eye

mood_atmosphere.aspirational: Luxury travel mood making viewer want to experience this era
mood_atmosphere.romantic: Belle Époque romance and golden hour magic
mood_atmosphere.instagram_friendly: Thumb-stopping visual impact for social media feeds

national_geographic_quality.storytelling: Complete narrative in single square frame

negative_prompt: modern elements, contemporary fashion, cars, modern buildings, plastic, neon signs, LED lights, smartphones, 21st century technology, bronze Eiffel Tower, incorrect historical period, anachronisms, harsh lighting, overcast sky, flat lighting, oversaturated colors, HDR look, amateur photography, low resolution, blurry, poor composition, snapshot quality, Instagram filter, excessive grain, lens distortion, cluttered composition, horizontal composition, stretched image

recommended_settings.color_depth: High bit depth for professional color grading

complete_prompt_string: Cinematic luxury travel photography of Paris 1889 during the Exposition Universelle, 1:1 square format for Instagram, golden hour lighting casting warm amber glow, newly inaugurated Eiffel Tower painted in Rouge Venise dark reddish-brown centered and towering against soft pastel peachy-pink sky, elegant Belle Époque crowd in period-accurate 1889 fashion in sharp foreground focus, women in S-silhouette dresses with corseted waists and elaborate feathered hats carrying lace parasols, men in impeccable three-piece suits and top hats with handlebar mustaches, Haussmannian architecture with cream limestone facades glowing golden bathed in sunset light flanking the square composition, grey-blue zinc mansard roofs with ornate wrought-iron balconies, cobblestone streets reflecting warm light, professional luxury campaign color grading with rich warm tones and elegant saturation, shot on medium format camera with beautiful depth of field, foreground tack sharp with soft bokeh background, atmospheric golden haze creating depth layers, National Geographic quality editorial photography, aspirational mood evoking timeless elegance and wanderlust, vibrant but refined sophisticated colors, every architectural detail and fabric texture ultra sharp in focus areas, 8K ultra detailed, luxury travel editorial aesthetic for Instagram, technically perfect composition and exposure, culturally authentic historical accuracy, visually stunning square format

alternative_prompts.option_1_tower_centered: Luxury travel photography, 1:1 square, golden hour, Rouge Venise Eiffel Tower centered vertically in frame, Belle Époque visitors in sharp foreground with period 1889 fashion, Haussmannian buildings flanking, soft bokeh background, professional color grading warm golden tones, medium format quality, National Geographic editorial, aspirational mood, 8K detailed, Instagram optimized
alternative_prompts.option_2_intimate_scene: Cinematic travel editorial, 1:1 square, golden hour Paris 1889, intimate street scene with elegantly dressed Belle Époque crowd in sharp focus, women in corseted S-silhouette dresses with parasols, men in top hats, Rouge Venise Tower in soft bokeh upper background, warm amber lighting, luxury campaign grading, medium format aesthetic, aspirational sophisticated mood, 8K ultra detailed, Instagram format
alternative_prompts.option_3_symmetrical: High-end travel photography, 1:1 square, golden hour lighting, symmetrical composition with Rouge Venise Eiffel Tower centered, Haussmannian facades flanking both sides creating balanced frame, Belle Époque figures in foreground, atmospheric golden haze, professional color grading vibrant elegant tones, medium format camera with cinematic depth of field, National Geographic quality, aspirational luxury mood, 8K detailed, perfect square Instagram composition

usage_notes.for_stable_diffusion: Use main_prompt + detailed_elements, include negative_prompt, photorealistic models
usage_notes.for_dalle: Use complete_prompt_string, emphasize square format and Instagram optimization
instagram_tips: Square format works perfectly for Instagram grid
Golden hour aesthetic creates strong engagement
Luxury travel style stands out in feeds
